name: Cornbread from Homemade Cornbread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Butter a 5-inch x 3-inch loaf pan.
3. In a bowl, beat together the egg, water, and melted butter. Stir in the homemade cornbread mix until just moistened. Do not overmix; the batter will be lumpy.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes. Makes 1 loaf.
Low-Fat Variation: Substitute egg substitute or 2 egg whites for the egg. Note: Cornbread baked in a glass, cast iron, or dark-metal pan develops a golden brown crust.
